transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the photography club meeting tonight?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. They're inviting a professional photographer to give a presentation.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the man going to the club meeting?

questions.prompt: Why is the man going to the club meeting?

choices.text: He wants to hear a professional photographer.
He has to return a camera.
He needs to register for a class.

questions.explanation: He is attending because a professional photographer will give a presentation.
questions.evidence: They're inviting a professional photographer to give a presentation.
